mapper.select: SELECT cm.USER_ID AS studentId, m.USER_NAME AS studentName, CASE TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) WHEN '01' THEN 'ATTEND' WHEN '02' THEN 'ABSENT' WHEN '03' THEN 'LATE' WHEN '04' THEN 'EARLY_LEAVE' END AS status FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID LEFT JOIN STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a ON a.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND TRUNC(a.ATND_REG_DT) = TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ORDER BY m.USER_NAME
mapper.update: MERGE INTO STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a USING ( SELECT #{stdUserId} AS STD_USER_ID, TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ATND_DT FROM DUAL ) src ON (a.STD_USER_ID = src.STD_USER_ID AND TRUNC(a.ATND_REG_DT) = src.ATND_DT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.ATND_TYPE_CD = #{atndTypeCd} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (STD_USER_ID, ATND_TYPE_CD, ATND_REG_DT) VALUES (#{stdUserId}, #{atndTypeCd}, TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(dates.ATND_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS atndDate, CASE TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) WHEN '01' THEN 'ATTEND' WHEN '02' THEN 'ABSENT' WHEN '03' THEN 'LATE' WHEN '04' THEN 'EARLY_LEAVE' END AS status FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TRUNC(sa.ATND_REG_DT) AS ATND_DT FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE sa JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON cm.USER_ID = sa.STD_USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ) dates LEFT JOIN STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a ON a.STD_USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(a.ATND_REG_DT) = dates.ATND_DT ORDER BY dates.ATND_DT ASC
